text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day after class, Matikanetannhauser comes
up to me looking cheerful.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I'm visiting my family on my next day off.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Every time I go back home, we have a party at my
family's restaurant to celebrate!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's my chance to stuff my face with their famous
jumbo fried lunch set. ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's my chance to stuff my face with their famous
jumbo fried lunch set. ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wha?! How'd you know what I was thinking?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I guess you're right... Now that I'm a
full-fledged athlete, I can't go stuffing my face
without considering the consequences.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right. I'll tell my parents not to go overboard.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...But a little fried mackerel couldn't hurt, could
it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I successfully prevent
Matikanetannhauser from overeating.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I will! It's been forever since I've had my parents'
cooking, so I'm gonna savor it while I can!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wait for me, my tender fried shrimp! I'll be there
soon, my juicy fried pork cutlets!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Matikanetannhauser ends up getting
plenty of nourishment during her trip home.
